---
title: "Tree 59 - Hornbeam"
toc: false
---

{{< include _tree-search.qmd >}}

![Tree 59 - Hornbeam in the Nature Discovery Garden](/assets/images/trees/tree59.jpg)

{{< include /assets/tree-species-info/hornbeam.md >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** Wildlife Garden (1994?)

**Diameter at breast height (1.2m):** 15.75cm (03/10/2025)
